Cragline.org: A web app to see the current weather conditions and forecasts for outdoor climbing crags around the UK. Crags can be selected and saved so your commonly visited crags stay on your main page. This web app is currently being hosted, and is OpenSource for anyone to use. Utilised tech: Flask - Python, HTML, CSS - TailwindCSS, API - Python, Cloud Hosting
rs-todo: A command line interface application to keep track of your current "to do's". Using the graphical user interface or purely CLI navigation, keep track, tick off and view archived tasks. Utilised tech: Rust
Text Explorer: Text Explorer is a command line based, dungeon explorer. Where the player can pick a character type to play with different skill sets and stats, they then choose how they wish to progresses through the dungeon. Each room they enter has options and when they encounter enemies they have to defeat them in turn based combat. With the aim to escape the dungeon alive. Utilised tech: C#, .NET
